authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #204 (owner-approved mocked-model scope, 2026-07-10): fully synthetic, standard-form-derived draft docx, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. description: Document-level gold case (issue #204): a SYNTHETIC counterparty draft .docx built from the canonical standard form (synthetic mode) with one planted hard-rejection insertion ('sole provider', rule no-exclusivity) in the 'Miscellaneous: Non-Exclusive' section, run through the actual extract -> normalize -> diff -> detector chain (scripts/extraction_normalization_stage.py -> scripts/diff_standard_form.py -> scripts/detector_common.py) -- NOT a per-fixture text snippet like the pre-#204 gold set.
